title: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch USW-Pro-XG-24
category: Ubiquiti / LAN networks / Switches / UniFi Switches
description: The UniFi Switch USW-Pro-XG-24 is a managed L3 switch with a switching capacity of 460 Gbps , featuring (8) 2.5-Gigabit LAN and (16) 10-Gigabit LAN ports, as well as (2) SFP28 (25G/10G/1G) ports. The Ethernet ports support the Etherlighting feature, allowing you to light up ports in different colors to indicate port location, speed/connection, and VLAN. The switch is powered via a standard 230V AC supply and includes a USP RPS DC port as a backup power source in case of primary power failure.… (8) 2.5G ports (16) 10G ports (2) 25/10/1G SFP28 ports Etherlighting â visual port status indicators Rack-mountable Managed via UniFi Network Server The USW-Pro-XG-24 does not include a web interface but is centrally managed through the UniFi Network Server with support for the UniFi mobile app. It offers a comprehensive set of advanced L2 and L3 switching features, including per-port operation modes (switching, mirroring, or aggregation). The UniFi Network Server and mobile app allow administrators to configure and monitor nearly all switch functions through a graphical user interface from anywhere Device Power cord Rackmount brackets
